subject: A luminous winged faerie figure hovering in a moonlit garden courtyard, wearing translucent flowing robes
description: A faerie figure hovers at center frame, arms slightly extended, surrounded by large translucent gossamer wings that spread wide to either side. The figure wears layered flowing robes that trail and billow beneath them. The coloring is cool — pale blues, lilacs, and silver-white — giving the figure an otherworldly luminosity against the dark background. Behind the figure, stone archways frame a night-blue sky, and silhouetted topiaries or hedge shapes flank the lower left and right. Tiny points of light or sparkles float around the figure's head. The mood is serene and ethereal.
foreground: winged faerie in translucent flowing robes, hovering with arms gently extended
background: moonlit courtyard with stone archways and silhouetted topiary
emotion: serene, open — arms gently extended in a welcoming or guiding gesture
